# InfraCost

> Infrastructure cost tracking dashboard for cloud and AI platforms

InfraCost is a self-hosted web application that tracks and optimizes infrastructure spending across multiple cloud platforms. It provides automated cost collection, budget alerts, depletion forecasts, drift detection, and plan limit tracking — all in a single dashboard.

## Key Features

- **Multi-Platform Tracking**: Automated API collectors for 9 platforms: Render, Railway, Anthropic, Neon, Turso, Resend, UptimeRobot, GCP, Websupport
- **Budget Alerts**: Threshold-based alerts (50%, 75%, 90%, 100%) via email (Resend) and WhatsApp (CallMeBot)
- **Depletion Forecasts**: Daily burn rate and runway projections for prepaid API credits
- **Drift Detection**: Compares live API service inventories against tracked records daily
- **Plan Limits**: Free tier usage tracking with progress bars and risk indicators
- **Live API Status**: Parallel health checks for all 9 platform APIs with 5-minute caching
- **Project Grouping**: Cost breakdown toggleable between "By Platform" and "By Project" views
- **Collection Freshness**: Per-platform timestamps showing data age with green/yellow/red indicators
- **Dual Currency**: All amounts shown in both USD and EUR

## Tech Stack

- Nuxt 4 (Vue 3) + Nuxt UI v4 + Tailwind CSS v4
- Drizzle ORM + PostgreSQL (Render)
- Google OAuth for authentication
- Daily cron collection at 06:00 UTC

## Pages

- `/` — Landing page + authenticated dashboard overview
- `/breakdown` — Per-service cost breakdown (by platform or by project)
- `/trends` — Monthly cost trends with MoM comparison
- `/platforms` — Platform cards with API status, freshness, account info
- `/limits` — Free tier plan limit usage tracking
- `/depletion` — Prepaid credit balance and depletion forecasts
- `/optimizations` — Cost optimization suggestions
- `/status` — UptimeRobot monitoring dashboard

## URL

https://infracost.eu

## Source

https://github.com/peter-fusek/infra-cost-optimizer
